name: Lock Folder
author: Danhawk
description: Right-click any folder in Explorer to lock or unlock it using Windows permission control.
details:
# Lock Folder

Adds **Lock Folder** and **Unlock Folder** as a submenu in the Explorer right-click menu.

## How it works
- Toggle **ON** — context menu appears instantly
- Toggle **OFF** — context menu removed instantly
- Right-click any folder → **Lock/Unlock Folder** → Lock or Unlock
- Runs completely silent, no popup windows

## Engine
Powered by the **Command Engine** with lifecycle hooks for registry control.

changes: Initial release — lifecycle-based Explorer context menu
